title: Hiring Software Engineer at iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates family as a Software Engineer in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
